Use: Bearings for motion system
Misc: 2.50 ea; Why so expensive? This is the cheapest supplier for APPROPRIATE bearings that are suitable for the extreme operating conditions in the printer. 80C is already extremely hard on the bearings. Paired with intense static radial loads, 45,000 RPMs generating massive amounts of heat from friction, plus the intense shocks from the gantry flinging around 5G, this is less of a splurge, and more like a bare minimum. any lesser/cheaper and the gantry will seize in a matter of minutes.

Use: Pulleys, drive the belts
Misc: 3.50 ea; Gates is the only supplier that uses gate's curvelinear belt profile that actually matches the belts. Conventionally, the circular profile is ok for lower speeds/tensions, but with GT3 and speeds of over 3000mm/s, this will quickly shred the belts into rubber dust. It happpened with panda v1.
